previousState: No local event taxonomy or delegated click/submit listener was present.
patchedState: Added apps/marketing/src/lib/analytics.ts with stable event names and prop cleaning.
Added apps/marketing/src/components/site/AnalyticsEvents.tsx for delegated click and submit tracking.
Instrumented home hero CTAs, pricing CTA, compare CTA, sample-pack unlock, JD-Forge demo start/complete, graded-answer interactions, contact/demo form submits, and Calendly outbound link.
privacyNotes: Events send only coarse page, surface, mode, count, and taxonomy props.
No candidate content, prompt text, email address, company name, or personal data is sent as analytics props.
